title: Mumbai Heat Wave
lead: Mumbai is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.80. The heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Mumbai are characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an umidita of 78% and a vento of 15.9 km/h.
 The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 12.3 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no relief in sight, and the city's infrastructure is likely to be severely tested.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
